title: Evert Glebbeek
text: Home * People * Evert Glebbeek Evert Glebbeek [1] Evert Glebbeek , a Dutch astrophysicist at Radboud Universiteit Nijmegen [2] and before at McMaster University in Hamilton, Ontario , Canada . As avocational games and chess programmer, Evert Glebbeek is author of the open source engines Jazz , Sjaak and Leonidas , all under the terms of the GNU General Public Licence . Sjaak and Leonidas are able to play various chess variants [3] , Sjaak not to confused with Ronald de Man's engine with the same name [4] .
